title: Cucina povera: la ricchezza della semplicità
grammar_features_introduced: B1 full-Italian prose — no English or French scaffolding
passato prossimo and imperfetto in narrative contrast
relative pronouns: che, ciò che, in cui, dietro la quale
idiomatic phrases: a chilometro zero, al massimo della loro dolcezza, stavano per essere buttati
notes: B1 capstone, pure Italian. No drill audio by design (page type fragment). Content is roughly 450 words of flowing Italian prose on cucina povera, its history, its contemporary reinterpretation, and the ironies of its fashionable revival. Intended as first reading-only encounter with extended Italian at B1 register.
